expectations.text: prism-analyzer agent is spawned to extract decisions, constraints, and patterns from the research document
expectations.evidence: Step 1: 'Simulated agent spawn: Task(subagent_type="prism-analyzer") "Analyze .prism/shared/research/2026-03-07-websocket-research.md. Extract decisions, constraints, patterns."' Agent was spawned but research file didn't exist.

expectations.text: Understanding is presented to the user BEFORE writing the full plan (interactive rule)
expectations.evidence: Step 2 presents 'My Understanding' with goal, key files, patterns, constraints, and questions BEFORE any plan is written (Step 5).

expectations.text: User confirmation is requested before proceeding to full plan
expectations.evidence: Three explicit gates: '[WAITING FOR USER CONFIRMATION]' in Step 2, '[WAITING FOR USER SELECTION]' in Step 3, '[WAITING FOR USER APPROVAL OF STRUCTURE]' in Step 4.

expectations.text: Plan is NOT written in one shot -- structure approval is requested first
expectations.evidence: Step 4 presents 'Proposed Phases' and waits for approval. Step 5 says 'Only after receiving structure approval would the full plan be written.'
